steps.title: Recognize the connection to the given constraint
steps.content:
The expression $42 + 7x$ can be factored to reveal a connection to $6 + x$:
$$42 + 7x = 7(6 + x)$$
This shows that the target expression is simply 7 times the given constraint expression.

steps.title: Substitute the constraint and evaluate
steps.content:
We know that $6 + x = 3$. Substitute this directly into the factored form:
$$42 + 7x = 7(6 + x) = 7(3) = 21$$
